languages.text: "Лишь многой кровью врагов {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} мы очистимся от скверны святотатственного попрания реликвии".

traits.locale_text: "Лишь многой кровью врагов {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} мы очистимся от скверны святотатственного попрания реликвии".
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

languages.text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."
languages.original_text: "Лишь многой кровью врагов {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Неумирающего{/g} мы очистимся от скверны святотатственного попрания реликвии".

traits.locale_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."
"Only with much blood of the Undying One's enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."
"Only with much blood of the Undying One's enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

languages.text: 「この聖なる遺物への冒涜的な踏みつけの汚染から我々を浄めるには、不死の敵の血を多く流さねばならない」
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the Undying One's enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: 「この聖なる遺物への冒涜的な踏みつけの汚染から我々を浄めるには、不死の敵の血を多く流さねばならない」

languages.text: «Se necesitará mucha sangre de los enemigos del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g} para purgar la mancha de este sacrílego atropello de la reliquia».
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: «Se necesitará mucha sangre de los enemigos del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Inmortal{/g} para purgar la mancha de este sacrílego atropello de la reliquia».

languages.text: "Nur sehr viel Blut der Feinde des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} kann uns von diesem frevelhaften Umgang mit dem Relikt reinwaschen."
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: "Nur sehr viel Blut der Feinde des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Todlosen{/g} kann uns von diesem frevelhaften Umgang mit dem Relikt reinwaschen."

languages.text: « Seuls des flots de sang issu des ennemis de {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}l'Immortel{/g} nous permettront de purifier la souillure que nous avons infligée à cette relique en la piétinant. »
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: « Seuls des flots de sang issu des ennemis de {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}l'Immortel{/g} nous permettront de purifier la souillure que nous avons infligée à cette relique en la piétinant. »

languages.text: “唯有以{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}敌人的鲜血，方能涤净我们亵渎践踏圣物所留下的污秽。”
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: “唯有以{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}不死之神{/g}敌人的鲜血，方能涤净我们亵渎践踏圣物所留下的污秽。”

languages.text: "Yadigârın bu şekilde saygısızca çiğnenmesinin lekesinden ancak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'in{/g} düşmanlarının kanıyla arınabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Only with much blood of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Undying One{/g}'s enemies shall we be cleansed of the taint of this sacrilegious trampling of the relic."

traits.locale_text: "Yadigârın bu şekilde saygısızca çiğnenmesinin lekesinden ancak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Ölmeyen'in{/g} düşmanlarının kanıyla arınabiliriz."
